title: Who is Anant Yardi? The man behind a Rs 150 crore gift to IIT Delhi
description: The institute said that the contribution will support cutting-edge work in artificial intelligence as well as a major campus infrastructure push.

title: Trust in AI’s financial acumen reaches almost 40%, neobank survey suggests
description: Some consumers view artificial intelligence as or more useful than human interaction, says Bunq

title: AI-assisted decision support system improves stroke care and long-term outcomes
description: A clinical decision support tool that uses artificial intelligence (AI) to analyze scans after a stroke alongside treatment recommendations is associated with better quality care and long term outcomes for patients compared with usual care, finds a study from China published by The BMJ today.

title: Neil deGrasse Tyson warns super-intelligent AI is a threat to humanity, we must stop it
description: American astrophysicist Neil deGrasse Tyson believes that artificial intelligence has a lot of positives for humanity. However, the AI that could perhaps reach superintelligence and surpass humans may be nothing short of lethal for humanity, something he urges must not be developed.
content: Artificial intelligence is transforming rapidly. Today, AI can do a lot more than it was capable of just a couple of years ago. Companies like OpenAI and xAI have a vision of AI reaching superintelligence – a state where machines can surpass human in... [2851 chars]

title: For India, the costs of the Iran war beyond LPG
description: The war’s downstream effects on smartphones, consumer electronics, automobiles, and artificial intelligence are a matter of time.
